persona: B2C growth PM, 10K weekly signups, focused on onboarding drop-off at step 3
prompt_to_designer: SMS the users who dropped at step 3 in the last 24 hours. Voice interview, 90 seconds hard cap. Daily digest in one paragraph, not a wall of quotes.
expected_outline_topics: what they expected step 3 to be
one word for the onboarding overall

sample_answers.text: You asked me to connect my bank and I got scared. I'll come back when I trust you more.
I thought step 3 was going to be picking a plan, not linking financial accounts.
No, I forgot honestly. Life got in the way.

expected_themes: bank-connect at step 3 breaks trust for new users
expectation mismatch: users thought step 3 = plan selection
abandoned users rarely self-return without a nudge
SMS opt-out compliance is nontrivial — hit a real STOP list
